name: SALTY LEMON CREAM & PARSLEY
subtitle: OLIVE OIL, LEMON JUICE, LEMON ZEST, DIJON MUSTARD, SEA SALT
intro: THIS IS A TOFU-BASED CREAM that you can use like sour cream or crème fraîche. I’ve experimented with several brands of silken tofu for this recipe, and I find that the Mori-Nu brand works best.
method: Set aside 2 tablespoons of the parsley. Put the remaining parsley in a blender. Add the tofu, lemon zest, lemon juice, oil, mustard, garlic, and salt and blend until creamy. Transfer to a bowl. Mince the reserved parsley and stir it in. Season with salt to taste, cover, and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving. Stored in the refrigerator, it will keep for 3 days.
